omitted_declarations.policy_reference: • Transportation and booking business partners: We may offer you the opportunity to use our Services to purchase transit tickets or book journeys with transportation providers (including those made available to you by our affiliates) as well as other features and services such as to connect to a third-party ride hailing or scooter sharing company. In those cases, we may share information with such partners to enable them to provide these services to you including to process transactions, etc. For example, we may share your name, contact information, and location data with transportation providers to facilitate journeys booked through the Services and we may share your journey data through an API integration to enable you to use their services efficiently. Note that these third parties collect and use your personal information under their own policies and practices.
